cli.check.complete: Check complete. Your Bharat Readiness Score is ready.
cli.fix.complete: All fixable violations have been resolved.
check.numberFormat.name: Number Format
check.numberFormat.description: Detects international number formatting instead of Indian Lakh/Crore system
check.fontStack.name: Font Stack
check.fontStack.description: Checks for Indic script font fallbacks in CSS
check.formalityRegister.name: Formality Register
check.formalityRegister.description: Scans Hindi translations for inappropriate tu-register pronouns
check.stringOverflow.name: String Overflow
check.stringOverflow.description: Identifies translated strings that may overflow fixed-width UI containers
check.coverage.name: Coverage
check.coverage.description: Measures percentage of Indian internet users reached by supported locales
grade.A: Excellent — Your app is well-prepared for Indian users.
grade.B: Good — Minor improvements needed for full Indic readiness.
grade.C: Fair — Several localization issues need attention.
grade.F: Failing — Critical localization issues must be fixed.
